scenes.text: Once upon a time, there lived a lonely astronaut named Eli who loved apples more than anything else. One day, while walking on the moon's dusty surface and enjoying his favorite apple, he stumbled upon something extraordinary. He noticed a tiny green shoot pushing through the lunar soil. It was unlike anything he'd seen before. Intrigued, Eli decided to care for this mysterious plant.
scenes.image_description: Eli smiling widely while holding an apple, beside a small green shoot on the moon

scenes.text: Days turned into weeks, and the little shoot grew into a tiny tree with shiny leaves. One evening, Eli heard a soft voice whispering, 'Thank you.' Startled, he looked around but saw no one. Then, to his surprise, he spotted a small glowing figure sitting on a moon rock. It was Moonbeam, the spirit of the moon's light, who had been waiting for someone kind enough to care for her tree. She offered Eli a wish in return.
scenes.image_description: Eli astonished by seeing Moonbeam glowing softly beside their tiny tree

scenes.text: Eli wished for the moon's apple tree to bear fruits that could grow anywhere, so children on Earth could enjoy them too. Moonbeam smiled and granted his wish. When Eli returned home, he brought with him a single seed from the moon's apple tree. He planted it in his backyard, and soon enough, an apple tree blossomed under the sunlight of Earth. Whenever Eli looked at the stars, he would remember his extraordinary friend on the moon, Moonbeam.
scenes.image_description: Eli planting a small seed in his backyard under the night sky
